name: Reverse Me! Rez/Ru
short_description: The first of the “Reverse me!” trilogy. Inspired by the fairy tale of “Little Red Riding Hood”, Reverse Me! Rez/Ru is the sad story of a friendship, a tragedy, and a quest to undo the disaster.
detailed_description:
Once upon a time there was a little boy, Russell, who lived in a small village. His grandfather, who liked the nature's calm best, lived in a small house in the woods.

Inspired by the fairy tale of “Little Red Riding Hood”, Reverse Me! Rez/Ru is the sad story of a friendship, a tragedy, and a quest to undo the disaster.

The first of the “Reverse me!” trilogy. The 2 other short stories, based on fairy tales, are released as DLCs.

Features
* A short and linear tale. 2.180 words
* Steam Achievements.
* Dual Language Story and User Interface. Both English and French appears at the same time.
